title: I built an AI that turns your chart screenshot into a full trade setup (SL/TP included)
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hey everyone,

I’ve been building a tool recently and wanted to share it with the community to get some real feedback.

👉 [https://herculmarket.com/](https://herculmarket.com/)

The concept is simple:  
You upload a screenshot of your chart (TradingView, MT4/MT5…), and the AI gives you a structured analysis of your setup.

It includes:

* Entry zone
* Stop Loss / Take Profit
* Key support & resistance levels
* Invalidation point
* Confidence score

The goal isn’t to replace your analysis, but to give you a **fast, objective second opinion** before entering a trade.

It works across markets (Forex, crypto, indices, stocks), but I’m especially interested in feedback from active traders here.

A few questions:

* Would you actually use something like this in your workflow?
* What would make this kind of tool reliable for you?
* What’s missing in current trading tools you’ve tried?

If you test it, I’d genuinely appreciate your feedback — positive or negative.

Thanks 🙌
